title: CEBA Loan Repayments, Administration Fees, Settlement, and Reconciliation
body_text:
CEBA Loan Repayments, Administration Fees, Settlement, and
Reconciliation
1	Introduction to CEBA Loan Repayments, Administration Fees, Settlement, and Reconciliation
1.1	Overview of CEBA Loan Repayments, Administration Fees, Settlement, and Reconciliation
CEBA loans funded by Export Development Canada (EDC) remain interest-free if repaid in full by December 31, 2023.
Your financial institution is responsible for reporting loan repayments and loan administration fees by the designated deadlines. Central 1 facilitates these processes between your financial institution and EDC.
This Part includes procedures for CEBA loan repayments, loan administration fee reporting, and the settlement and reconciliation process.
Related Information
Current Account Services (CAS) Online Part
